summary: A clip from a Fox 5 news report carrying a station bug, an on-screen clock and a 'DEVELOPING STORY' banner. Sampled frames show two side-by-side surveillance stills of a person with a dog inside a building and a person in a 'NOT TODAY' t-shirt, with faces blurred. A chyron reads 'CHARGES NOT YET FILED FOR RESCUE ABUSE CASE'.

script.scene: Two side-by-side surveillance stills of a person walking a dog and a person in a 'NOT TODAY' shirt, faces blurred; chyron 'CHARGES NOT YET FILED FOR RESCUE ABUSE CASE'.

notable_text: DEVELOPING STORY; CHARGES NOT YET FILED FOR RESCUE ABUSE CASE; FOX 5; NOT TODAY
